title: Email Notification Not Sending
description: System fails to send email notifications after a new order is placed.

title: Profile Picture Upload Error
description: Users cannot upload profile pictures larger than 2MB.

title: Search Bar Not Responding
description: Clicking the search icon does not trigger the search functionality.

title: Dashboard Widgets Overlapping
description: Widgets overlap each other on smaller laptop screens.

title: Order History Missing Items
description: Some purchased items are not appearing in the user's order history.

title: Language Switcher Bug
description: Changing language resets the page to the homepage unexpectedly.

title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Checkout process times out while connecting to the payment gateway.

title: Broken Image Links
description: Several product images are not loading on the catalog page.

title: Notification Badge Count Incorrect
description: Notification icon shows incorrect unread message count.

title: Report Download Button Not Working
description: Clicking the download button does not generate the requested report.
